Emily Johnson
San Antonio, TX

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 3 years of experience in retail environments. Possesses strong communication skills and a commitment to customer satisfaction. Looking to transition into warehouse operations to broaden skill set and contribute to a team-oriented environment.

Experience
Customer Service Associate  
Walmart, San Antonio, TX  
June 2020 - Present  
- Assisted customers with product inquiries and transactions in a fast-paced retail setting.  
- Handled returns and exchanges, ensuring customer satisfaction.  
- Maintained cleanliness and organization of the sales floor and stockroom.  

Sales Associate  
Target, San Antonio, TX  
April 2019 - May 2020  
- Provided assistance to customers in locating products and answering questions.  
- Operated cash registers and managed daily cash deposits.  
- Participated in inventory management and restocking of merchandise.  

Intern  
Local Animal Shelter, San Antonio, TX  
January 2018 - March 2019  
- Assisted in daily operations and care for animals at the shelter.  
- Engaged with the community to promote adoption events and fundraising.  
- Developed organizational skills by managing records of animal care and adoptions.

Certifications
- CPR and First Aid Certified  
- Customer Service Excellence Training  

Skills
- Strong verbal and written communication skills  
- Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite  
- Ability to work in a team environment  
- Excellent problem-solving abilities  

Education

University of Texas at San Antonio, San Antonio, TX
